title: JSON-stat 2.0 Curated Index Schema
description: Curated de-duplicated index schema (general oneOf of all three classes). The vendored schemas/vendored/index.json re-inlines the full per-class property sets three times inside its oneOf; this version $refs core.json#/$defs/{datasetProperties,dimensionProperties,collectionProperties} once each, which is the single largest de-duplication win. Semantically equivalent (enforced by the curated-equiv-vendored parity test).
